payload.title: Milestone B: assemble multi-tenant hosted modules into the running server
payload.description: The hosted modules exist (auth_hosted/, quota/, realtime/, pg/) but are NOT wired into the running server — SCP-161 shipped only the Milestone-A single-instance cloud mode. Milestone B: under SCOPE_PG_URL, wire the Postgres-backed store + replay, the hosted OIDC/API-key auth middleware (note: createHostedAuthMiddleware + OIDC routes still need writing per the SCP-161 spec), LISTEN/NOTIFY fan-out replacing the in-process bus, and the quota middleware — turning the single-instance hub into a horizontally-scalable multi-tenant SaaS. Large; needs a Fly Postgres + OIDC app.
